ascii_renderer.c(3) Library Functions Manual ascii_renderer.c(3)

NAME

ascii_renderer.c - WASM ASCII renderer using libvterm, FreeType, and raylib.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct ascii_renderer_t

Functions


void ascii_renderer_init (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)
void ascii_renderer_render_frame (const char *ansi_data, int len)
void ascii_renderer_resize (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)
int ascii_renderer_get_cols (void)
int ascii_renderer_get_rows (void)
const uint8_t * ascii_renderer_get_framebuffer (void)
int ascii_renderer_get_framebuffer_width (void)
int ascii_renderer_get_framebuffer_height (void)
int ascii_renderer_get_framebuffer_stride (void)
void ascii_renderer_shutdown (void)

Variables


const unsigned char g_font_default []
const unsigned int g_font_default_size

Detailed Description

WASM ASCII renderer using libvterm, FreeType, and raylib.

This module provides real-time ASCII art rendering for the web client. It uses:

  • libvterm for ANSI escape code parsing and terminal emulation
  • FreeType for glyph rasterization (using embedded DejaVu Sans Mono)
  • raylib for single-texture WebGL rendering

The render pipeline: ANSI string → libvterm cell grid → FreeType glyphs → RGB framebuffer → raylib texture → single WebGL draw call

Definition in file ascii_renderer.c.

Function Documentation

void
  ascii_renderer_init (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)


Initialize the ASCII renderer with pixel dimensions


Parameters


pixel_width Canvas width in pixels


pixel_height Canvas height in pixels


Definition at line 119 of file ascii_renderer.c.


119                                                             {
120   if (renderer.vt) {
121     log_warn("ascii_renderer_init called but renderer already initialized");
122     return;
123   }
124 
125   renderer.width_px = pixel_width;
126   renderer.height_px = pixel_height;
127   renderer.pitch = ((pixel_width * 3 + 3) / 4) * 4; /* Align to 4 bytes */
128 
129   /* Allocate framebuffer */
130   renderer.framebuffer =
131       SAFE_MALLOC(renderer.pitch * pixel_height, uint8_t *);
132   if (!renderer.framebuffer) {
133     log_error("Failed to allocate framebuffer");
134     return;
135   }
136   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * pixel_height);
137 
138   /* Initialize FreeType */
139   if (FT_Init_FreeType(&renderer.ft_lib)) {
140     log_error("Failed to initialize FreeType");
141     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
142     return;
143   }
144 
145   /* Load embedded DejaVu Sans Mono font */
146   if (FT_New_Memory_Face(renderer.ft_lib, g_font_default,
147                           (FT_Long)g_font_default_size, 0, &renderer.ft_face)) {
148     log_error("Failed to load default font");
149     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
150     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
151     return;
152   }
153 
154   /* Set font size: 12pt at 96 DPI */
155   FT_Set_Char_Size(renderer.ft_face, 0, 12 * 64, 96, 96);
156 
157   /* Measure cell dimensions using 'M' */
158   FT_Load_Char(renderer.ft_face, 'M', FT_LOAD_RENDER);
159 
160   renderer.cell_w = renderer.ft_face->glyph->advance.x >> 6;
161   renderer.cell_h = renderer.ft_face->glyph->bitmap.rows;
162   renderer.baseline = (3 * renderer.cell_h) / 4;
163 
164   /* Adjust height for 2:1 aspect ratio */
165   renderer.cell_h = renderer.cell_w * 2;
166 
167   renderer.cols = pixel_width / renderer.cell_w;
168   renderer.rows = pixel_height / renderer.cell_h;
169 
170   log_info("ASCII renderer initialized: %dx%d pixels, %dx%d cells, font size %dx%d",
171            pixel_width, pixel_height, renderer.cols, renderer.rows,
172            renderer.cell_w, renderer.cell_h);
173 
174   /* Initialize libvterm */
175   renderer.vt = vterm_new(renderer.rows, renderer.cols);
176   if (!renderer.vt) {
177     log_error("Failed to create VTerm");
178     FT_Done_Face(renderer.ft_face);
179     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
180     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
181     return;
182   }
183 
184   renderer.vts = vterm_obtain_screen(renderer.vt);
185 
186   /* Initialize raylib window on first render (lazy init)
187    * This avoids blocking on InitWindow during initialization */
188 
189 }






References g_font_default, g_font_default_size,
    log_error, log_info, log_warn, SAFE_FREE,
    SAFE_MALLOC, and ascii_renderer_t::width_px.






void
  ascii_renderer_render_frame (const char * ansi_data, int len)


Render an ANSI escape sequence frame


Parameters


ansi_data Pointer to ANSI string data


len Length of ANSI string in bytes


Definition at line 199 of file ascii_renderer.c.


199                                                                  {
200   log_debug("[ascii_renderer_render_frame] Called with ansi_data=%p, len=%d", ansi_data, len);
201 
202   if (!renderer.vt || !renderer.framebuffer) {
203     log_warn("ascii_renderer_render_frame: renderer not initialized");
204     return;
205   }
206 
207   if (!ansi_data || len <= 0) {
208     log_warn("ascii_renderer_render_frame: empty ANSI input");
209     return;
210   }
211 
212   /* Feed ANSI data to vterm for parsing and cell state updates */
213   vterm_input_write(renderer.vt, ansi_data, len);
214 
215   /* Clear framebuffer to black background */
216   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * renderer.height_px);
217 
218   /* Render each cell from the vterm screen state */
219   for (int row = 0; row < renderer.rows; row++) {
220     for (int col = 0; col < renderer.cols; col++) {
221       VTermPos pos = {row, col};
222       VTermScreenCell cell;
223       vterm_screen_get_cell(renderer.vts, pos, &cell);
224 
225       /* Skip empty cells */
226       if (cell.chars[0] == 0) {
227         continue;
228       }
229 
230       /* Calculate pixel coordinates for this cell */
231       int cell_x = col * renderer.cell_w;
232       int cell_y = row * renderer.cell_h;
233 
234       /* Extract background color */
235       uint8_t bg_r = 0, bg_g = 0, bg_b = 0;
236       if (VTERM_COLOR_IS_RGB(&cell.bg)) {
237         bg_r = cell.bg.rgb.red;
238         bg_g = cell.bg.rgb.green;
239         bg_b = cell.bg.rgb.blue;
240       }
241 
242       /* Fill cell background */
243       fill_rect(renderer.framebuffer, renderer.pitch, cell_x, cell_y,
244                 renderer.cell_w, renderer.cell_h, bg_r, bg_g, bg_b);
245 
246       /* Extract foreground color (default white) */
247       uint8_t fg_r = 255, fg_g = 255, fg_b = 255;
248       if (VTERM_COLOR_IS_RGB(&cell.fg)) {
249         fg_r = cell.fg.rgb.red;
250         fg_g = cell.fg.rgb.green;
251         fg_b = cell.fg.rgb.blue;
252       }
253 
254       /* Load and render glyph */
255       uint32_t codepoint = cell.chars[0];
256       if (FT_Load_Char(renderer.ft_face, codepoint, FT_LOAD_RENDER)) {
257         continue;
258       }
259 
260       /* Get glyph bitmap */
261       FT_Glyph glyph;
262       if (FT_Get_Glyph(renderer.ft_face->glyph, &glyph)) {
263         continue;
264       }
265 
266       FT_BitmapGlyph bitmap_glyph = (FT_BitmapGlyph)glyph;
267 
268       /* Calculate glyph position with baseline adjustment */
269       int glyph_x = cell_x + bitmap_glyph->left;
270       int glyph_y = cell_y + renderer.baseline - bitmap_glyph->top;
271 
272       /* Composite glyph onto framebuffer */
273       blit_glyph(&bitmap_glyph->bitmap, glyph_x, glyph_y,
274                   fg_r, fg_g, fg_b, bg_r, bg_g, bg_b);
275 
276       FT_Done_Glyph(glyph);
277     }
278   }
279 
280   /* Note: In WASM, texture update would happen here but raylib
281    * requires a window context which isn't available in browser.
282    * The framebuffer is maintained for potential future use.
283    * The actual rendering on screen happens via xterm.js on the JS side. */
284 }






References log_debug, and log_warn.






void
  ascii_renderer_resize (int pixel_width, int pixel_height)


Resize the renderer to new pixel dimensions


Parameters


pixel_width New canvas width in pixels


pixel_height New canvas height in pixels


Definition at line 294 of file ascii_renderer.c.


294                                                               {
295   if (!renderer.vt || !renderer.framebuffer) {
296     log_warn("ascii_renderer_resize: renderer not initialized");
297     return;
298   }
299 
300   if (pixel_width == renderer.width_px && pixel_height == renderer.height_px) {
301     return;
302   }
303 
304   log_info("ascii_renderer_resize: %dx%d -> %dx%d", renderer.width_px,
305            renderer.height_px, pixel_width, pixel_height);
306 
307   /* Free old texture */
308   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
309     UnloadTexture(renderer.texture);
310     renderer.texture_initialized = false;
311   }
312 
313   /* Reallocate framebuffer */
314   SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
315   renderer.width_px = pixel_width;
316   renderer.height_px = pixel_height;
317   renderer.pitch = ((pixel_width * 3 + 3) / 4) * 4;
318 
319   renderer.framebuffer =
320       SAFE_MALLOC(renderer.pitch * pixel_height, uint8_t *);
321   if (!renderer.framebuffer) {
322     log_error("Failed to reallocate framebuffer");
323     return;
324   }
325   memset(renderer.framebuffer, 0, renderer.pitch * pixel_height);
326 
327   /* Update terminal dimensions */
328   int new_cols = pixel_width / renderer.cell_w;
329   int new_rows = pixel_height / renderer.cell_h;
330 
331   if (new_cols != renderer.cols || new_rows != renderer.rows) {
332     renderer.cols = new_cols;
333     renderer.rows = new_rows;
334     vterm_set_size(renderer.vt, new_rows, new_cols);
335   }
336 
337   /* Create new texture */
338   Image img = {
339       .data = renderer.framebuffer,
340       .width = pixel_width,
341       .height = pixel_height,
342       .mipmaps = 1,
343       .format = PIXELFORMAT_UNCOMPRESSED_R8G8B8,
344   };
345   renderer.texture = LoadTextureFromImage(img);
346   renderer.texture_initialized = true;
347 
348   log_info("ascii_renderer_resize complete: %dx%d cells", renderer.cols,
349            renderer.rows);
350 }






References log_error, log_info, log_warn,
    SAFE_FREE, and SAFE_MALLOC.






void
  ascii_renderer_shutdown (void )


Shutdown the ASCII renderer and free resources


Definition at line 424 of file ascii_renderer.c.


424                                    {
425   if (renderer.texture_initialized) {
426     UnloadTexture(renderer.texture);
427     renderer.texture_initialized = false;
428   }
429 
430   if (renderer.vt) {
431     vterm_free(renderer.vt);
432     renderer.vt = NULL;
433   }
434 
435   if (renderer.ft_face) {
436     FT_Done_Face(renderer.ft_face);
437   }
438 
439   if (renderer.ft_lib) {
440     FT_Done_FreeType(renderer.ft_lib);
441   }
442 
443   if (renderer.framebuffer) {
444     SAFE_FREE(renderer.framebuffer);
445   }
446 
447   memset(&renderer, 0, sizeof(renderer));
448   log_info("ASCII renderer shut down");
449 }






References log_info, and SAFE_FREE.
